display_information.name: Signal
display_information.description: Calm Slack for neurodivergent professionals — Focus Mode, Social Translator, Catch-Up, and Deep Work Protector.
display_information.long_description:
Signal makes Slack accessible for neurodivergent professionals (ADHD, autism, anxiety).

Features:
• Focus Mode — Detects fast-moving channels, generates AI decision tree summaries
• Social Translator — Decodes passive-aggressive messages into plain language via DM
• Catch-Up — Semantic search with AI summaries of what you missed
• Deep Work Protector — Blocks focus time on calendar, sets Slack status, pauses notifications
• Quiet Hours Digest — Batches non-urgent mentions into structured daily digest

Built on Slack AI, MCP Server Integration, and Real-Time Search API.

slash_commands.description: Translate an ambiguous workplace message into plain language
Get AI summary of what you missed about a topic
Force-send your Quiet Hours Digest now
